summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification: Scoped Bulk Save Fields - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API (POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified) correctly saves all 16+ field types including spec fields (material, finish, type, edge, slip_rating, suitability, thickness), filter fields (size, made_in, underfloor_heating), array fields (rooms, styles, colors, features), and category fields (main_category, sub_categories). Frontend Bulk Category Editor modal opens correctly, shows all specification fields, and scoped save functionality works as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified saves all 7 spec fields (material, finish, type, edge, slip_rating, suitability, thickness)
VERIFIED: POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified saves filter fields (size, made_in, underfloor_heating)
VERIFIED: POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified saves array fields (rooms, styles, colors, features)
VERIFIED: POST /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-update-unified saves category fields (main_category, sub_categories)
VERIFIED: Updating one field does NOT clear other existing fields
VERIFIED: Multiple products can be updated with different values (scoped save scenario)
VERIFIED: Tiles collection is synced when supplier_products is updated
VERIFIED: Bulk Category Editor modal opens with 'Edit Categories' button (data-testid='bulk-category-btn')
VERIFIED: Specifications section shows all spec fields (Material, Finish, Type, Edge, Slip Rating, Suitability, Thickness, Size, Made In)
VERIFIED: Filters section shows filter fields with scoped assignments
VERIFIED: Scoped save sends per-product payloads - console logs show '[Bulk Update] Scoped update active'
VERIFIED: Preview & Apply button shows all fields that will be saved
VERIFIED: Save completes successfully with 'All 18 products saved successfully' message

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, scoped save working)

seed_data_creation: Created test products with SKU prefix TEST_SCOPED_SAVE_ for backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: Scoped bulk save now correctly includes all field types. The fix was in handleBulkCategoryUpdate's scoped path (lines 3776-3860 in SupplierProducts.js). Three changes were made: 1) Added filter_size to scopedScalarFilterMapping, 2) Added code to re-inject direct specFieldNames from updatePayload into productPayload, 3) Added catch-all for dynamic filter_* keys and filter array fields. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_scoped_bulk_save_fields.py can be run with: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://feature-verification-7.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_scoped_bulk_save_fields.py -v

backend_bulk_update_unified.array_fields: PASS - rooms, styles, colors, features all save correctly
backend_bulk_update_unified.category_fields: PASS - main_category, sub_categories all save correctly
backend_bulk_update_unified.field_preservation: PASS - updating one field does not clear others
backend_bulk_update_unified.scoped_save: PASS - different products can have different values

frontend_bulk_category_editor.filters_section: PASS - shows filter fields with scoped assignments
frontend_bulk_category_editor.categories_section: PASS - shows categories with scoped assignments
frontend_bulk_category_editor.preview_apply_button: PASS - shows all fields to be saved
